title: onobrychis peduncularis var. eriophora
intro: Onobrychis peduncularis var. eriophora, commonly known as a variety of the sainfoin plant, is a flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The sainfoin plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Onobrychis peduncularis var. eriophora include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of the sainfoin plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
